name: 危機懸念鉤子
description: Ashley被綁架囚禁，Cora趁機冒充取代她的位置，觀眾擔心女主能否逃脫、男主是否會被騙，製造強烈的緊張感和追看動力。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: If you shut your mouth, I will shut it for you. / Tristan, where are you? Come and save me, please. / If you stay here quietly for a month, I'll let you go.
